gaps: A snapshot enrichment that inlines the linked opinion cluster's metadata (date, disposition text, panel) for sparse historical dockets
A stats cut over structural cohorts (e.g. 'has opinion cluster, no cert dates') rather than only court/topic/judge/term
helpful: fedcourts stats --group-by disposition gave the decisive base-rate table for the historical SCOTUS population
fedcourts query sample rows showed how era merits cases are labeled ('other') and that similar dockets carry predict_excluded
notes: Topic-filtered query (--topic railroad) returned nothing for this case's subject; base rates carried the prediction.
